schema_sql_statements: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_claim_records ( temp_claim_record_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, preview_draft_id TEXT NOT NULL, source_operation_id TEXT NOT NULL, source_temp_intent_id TEXT NOT NULL, temp_idempotency_key TEXT NOT NULL, claim_candidate_text_source TEXT NOT NULL, raw_manual_note_text_included INTEGER NOT NULL, created_in_temp_db_now INTEGER NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_idempotency_records ( temp_idempotency_key TEXT PRIMARY KEY, preview_draft_id TEXT NOT NULL, selected_claim_operation_id TEXT NOT NULL, transaction_plan_fingerprint TEXT NOT NULL, design_fingerprint TEXT NOT NULL, storage_scope TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_rollback_records ( temp_rollback_record_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, temp_idempotency_key TEXT NOT NULL, target_temp_claim_record_id TEXT NOT NULL, rollback_strategy TEXT NOT NULL, rollback_executed_now INTEGER NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_review_audit_records ( temp_review_audit_record_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, preview_draft_id TEXT NOT NULL, selected_claim_operation_id TEXT NOT NULL, design_fingerprint TEXT NOT NULL, records_operator_decision INTEGER NOT NULL, records_prototype_design_inputs INTEGER NOT NULL )

gate_results.message: Source prototype design is ready and all design gates pass.
Temp DB path is constrained to /tmp/augnes-single-claim-write-prototype-v0-1.
No product DB path or product DB write authority is present.

Executable SQL is limited to temp harness tables.
The temp record shape excludes raw manual note text.
No product or canonical identifiers are created.
The harness does not call providers, retrieval, RAG, or source fetch.
The harness sends no external handoff.
